channel.title: Home on Apoorva Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Apoorva Sharma

item.title: Minimal Personal Site with Hugo
item.description:
This project is a deliberately minimal personal site: no JavaScript bundle, no theme dependency, and a small amount of CSS that I can understand at a glance.

The goal is to have a home for long-form writing on cloud engineering, notes on fitness, and concise write-ups of projects I care about—without taking on a maintenance burden.

item.title: Building a Sustainable Training Habit
item.description:
I used to treat training as something I did in intense bursts: a few weeks of focus followed by months of inconsistency. The shift came when I stopped optimizing for short-term results and started optimizing for repeatability.

Now, I aim for sessions that I can sustain even on low-energy days. Simple compound lifts, short conditioning work, and a focus on sleep and recovery have made training feel like part of my identity instead of a project.

item.title: Designing Reliable Cloud Systems
item.description: Why I design cloud systems for contained failure, boring reliability, and easy reasoning instead of maximum novelty.

item.title: About
item.description: I am Apoorva Sharma, a cloud engineer focused on Azure and resilient systems. This site is a simple place to share ideas, document projects, and track progress in both technology and fitness.
